text: mashqla' dḥabrih dmarya' 'al ysrayil: b'yda' dmala'ky.
qam maḥebenawkwn: bi'mara' yli' marya'. w'merawkwn: bmwdy mwḥebaḥlwk: li' yli' 'aḥwna' 'isw lya'qwb: bi'mara' yli' marya': 'yna' mwḥebly lya'qwb:
wl'isw snily: w'bedly ṭwranwhy wayran: wyartwtih ltanynyati' dbarya'.

kad 'amra' 'adwm: peshlan mwḥrebi': dayraḥ wbanaḥ ḥarabyi': hadka' bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt: 'any bany: w'ana' bet talḥen: wbet qary 'elay: teḥwb dbyshwta': wṭayepa' dkrebli' 'alwhy marya' hal 'alam.
w'aynawkwn bet ḥazy: w'aḥtwn bet 'amrytwn: hawi' gwra' marya' l'elel mn teḥwb dysrayil.

brwna' ki' myaqer lbaba': wriga' lmarih. bas 'en baba' ywen 'ana': 'ayka' yli' 'yqary: w'en mara' ywen 'ana': 'ayka' yla' zdw'ty: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt 'elawkwn: kahni' maslyani' dshemy. w'merawkwn: bmwdy mwslilan lshemwk:
maqrwbi' yna' 'al madbḥy laḥma' ṭama'': w'merawkwn: bmwdy 'bedlan ṭam'wta' 'elwk: b'martawkwn: patwra' dmarya' mwslya' yli':
wkad maqrebytwn semya' ledbaḥa': li' yla' ḥerba': wkad maqrebytwn saqat wmer'ya': li' yla' ḥerba'. di' maqreb lih lhakymwk: bet basma' lih bywk: yan bet qabel patwk: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
w'adya': di' parpelwn bpata' d'alaha': w'abed raḥmi' 'alan: mn 'ydawkwn hwila' 'aha': ki' qabel menawkwn pata': bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
many 'wp gawawkwn: wdaber tar'ani': wla' malhytwn lmadbḥy habas. layt ly rezaya' byawkwn: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt: wqwrbana' li' qablen mn 'ydawkwn.
sabab mn zraqa' dshemsha' whal gnayih: gwra' yli' shemy gaw melati': wbkl dwkta' besma' ki' payesh mwqreba' lshemy: wqwrbana' dekya'. sabab gwra' yli' shemy gaw melati': bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
w'aḥtwn ki' shaḥmytwn lih: b'martawkwn: patwra' dmarya' ṭama'' yli': mwslyta' yla' mi'kwltih.
w'merawkwn: ha': kma' kkaḥta': wqam napḥytwn lih: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt: wmwtyilawkwn klyga' wsaqat: wmer'ya': wmwtyilawkwn qwrbana': bet basma' ly byih mn 'ydawkwn: bi'mara' yli' marya'.
wlyṭa' yli' palmana': d'yt bpesqih 'wrza': wnaker wdabeḥ ḥryba' lmarya': sabab dmalka' gwra' ywen 'ana': bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt: wshemy sahmana' yli' gaw melati'.
w'adya' 'elawkwn 'aha' pwqdana': kahni'.

'en la' sham'ytwn: w'en la' matbytwn 'al leba': lyahba' 'yqara' lshemy: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt: bet shadren byawkwn lawṭta': wbet layṭen bwrkatawkwn: w'wp lyṭayly: sabab dli' ytwn matwbi' 'al leba'.
ha': 'ana' bengawa' ywen sabab dyawkwn lbarzar'a': wbet barbezen perta' 'al patawkwn: perta' d'i'dawkwn: wbet shaqel lawkwn 'elah.
wbet yad'ytwn dshwdery 'elawkwn 'aha' pwqdana': lehwaya' qawly 'am liwy: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
qawly hwili' 'amih dḥayi' wshlama': wyehbayly 'elih lzdw'ta': wzde'li' meny: wmn qadm shemy sh'eshli' hw.
namwsa' dsarastwta' hwili' bpwmih: w'awla' la' mshkeḥli' bsepwatwhy: bshlama' wbtrwṣwta' ḥderi' 'amy: wraba' mwderi' mn 'awla'.
sabab dsepwati' dkahna' ki' naṭry ydi'ta': wnamwsa' ki' baqry mn pwmih: sabab qaṣed dmarya' ṣba'wt yli' hw.
w'aḥtwn qleblawkwn mn 'wrḥa': w'bedlawkwn dtarqely raba' bnamwsa': mwḥreblawkwn qawla' dliwy: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
w'wp 'ana' qam 'abdenawkwn mwslyi' wkwpi' lklih ṭayepa' kma' dli' ytwn benṭara' 'wrḥaty: wbeshqala' ytwn pata' bnamwsa'.
ha' li' yli' ḥad baba' lklan: ha' la' ḥad 'alaha' qam bari' lan: qamwdy 'bedli' ḥayynwta' 'nasha' b'aḥwnih: leshḥama' qawla' dbabawatan:
'bedla' ḥayynwta' yhwda': wṭam'wta' peshla' 'bydta' bysrayil wb'wreshlem: sabab dshḥemla' yhwda' lqwdsha' dmarya' dmwḥebli': wgberi' brata' d'alaha' nwkraya'.
bet qaṭe' marya' l'nasha' d'abed lah: r'ysha' wgwebana': mn mashkni' dya'qwb: wmaqrebana' dqwrbana' lmarya' ṣba'wt.
w'aha' gaha' dtartiy 'bedlawkwn: lkaswyi' dem'ta' lmadbḥa' dmarya': bekya' wshaplapta': mn dlayt medri' ḥyarta' lqwrbana': lqabwli' brezaya' mn 'ydawkwn.
w'merawkwn: sabab dmwdy: sabab dmarya' yehbeli' sahdwta' biylwk wbiyl bakta' dgwanqwtwk: d'ant 'bedlwk ḥayynwta' 'alwh: why ḥabartwk yla' wbakta' dqawlwk.
wla' ḥad 'bedli': wsama' pysha' drwḥa' 'elih: wqa' mwdy ḥad: beba'ya' hwa' zar'a' d'alaha'. whawytwn heshyar brwḥawkwn: wbbakta' dgwanqwtwk la' hawya' 'bydta' ḥayynwta'.
kad sani' rapi': bi'mara' yli' marya' 'alaha' dysrayil: wki' kasi' zlwmya' 'al lbeshtih: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt. whawytwn heshyar brwḥawkwn: wla' 'abdytwn ḥayynwta'.
mwgihlawkwn lmarya' bḥabrawkwn. 'yna' 'merawkwn: bmwdy mwgihlan: b'martawkwn: kl d'abed byshta': ṣpayy yli' b'ayni' dmarya': wbyay hw ki' basma' lih: yan 'ayka' yli' 'alaha' ddywan:

ha': 'ana' shadwri' ywen qaṣedy: wbet hader 'wrḥa' qadmy: mensheltani' bet 'ati' lhayklih: marya' d'aḥtwn beba'ya' ytwn: wmala'ka' dqawla': d'aḥtwn ki' basma' lawkwn byih: ha': bi'taya' yli': bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
wmany ḥamel ywma' d'taytih: wmany kali' kad payesh ḥezya': sabab hw 'ayk nwra' dṣarepana' yli': w'ayk tyzab dmaḥwerani'.
wbet yateb ṣarepana' wdakyana' dsi'ma': wbet daki' lbnay liwy: wbet ṣapi' lhwn 'ayk dahba' w'ayk si'ma': wbet hawy lmarya' maqribani' dqwrbana' bzadyqwta'.
wbet hawi' basyma' lmarya' qwrbana' dyhwda' wd'wreshlem: 'ayk ywmani' d'alam: w'ayk sheni' qadymy.

wbet qarbenen 'elawkwn ldywan: wbet hawen sahda' yalzana': bḥarashi': wgayari': wbyamyani' ldwgla': wbzalmani' dhaqa' ddbyqa' bhaqa': 'armelta': wyatwma': wmaqlebani' dmashaḥaṭ: wdli' zad'y meny: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
sabab d'ana' ywen marya': la' ḥleply: w'aḥtwn: bnay ya'qwb: la' temlawkwn.
ha': mn ywmani' dbabawatawkwn qleblawkwn mn qanwny: wla' nṭerawkwn: dwrwn lkesly: wdayren 'elawkwn: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt. w'merawkwn: bmwdy dayraḥ:
ki' zaleq barnasha' l'alaha': sabab 'aḥtwn bezlama' ytwn 'ely. w'merawkwn: bmwdy zlemlan 'elwk: bma'sara': wqwrbana' dmaramta'.
blawṭta' 'aḥtwn lyṭi' ytwn: w'ely 'aḥtwn bezlama' ytwn: klah melat.

maytymwn klih ma'sara' l'anbari': whawya' mi'kwlta' gaw bayty: wdi' garbwn ly b'aha': bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt: 'en la' patḥen 'elawkwn kawati' dshmaya': wsapqen 'elawkwn bwrkta': hal dla' (hawya' dwkta') basa'.
wbet nagwen bwt dyawkwn b'aklana': wli' maḥreb 'elawkwn ṭ'wnyati' d'ar'a': wli' rapya' 'elwkwn gepta' bḥaqla': bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
wbet yahby ṭwba' 'elawkwn klay melati': kad hawytwn 'aḥtwn 'ar'a' drezaya': bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
ḥwlenwn 'aly ḥabrawkwn: bi'mara' yli' marya'. w'merawkwn: mwdy hwmzemlan 'alwk:
'merawkwn: habas yla' leplaḥa' l'alaha': wmwdy payda' dnṭeran nṭwrtwhy: wdḥderan bpashamta' qadm marya' ṣba'wt:
w'adya' 'aḥnan byahba' ywaḥ ṭwba' lḥtyri': 'wp peshlwn benyi' 'abdani' dbyshwta': 'wp gwreblwn l'alaha': wḥleṣlwn.
hygah hwmzemlwn zed'yi' dmarya': 'nasha' 'am ḥabrih: wmwṣyetli' marya' wshme'li': wpeshli' ktyba' ktaba' ddkara' qadmih: lzed'yi' dmarya': wlḥashbani' dshemih.
wbet hawy dyy: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt: lywma' d'ana' 'abden ma'l dgany: wbet raḥmen 'alay: da'ky da'ky draḥem 'nasha' 'al brwnih dpaleḥ 'elih.
wbet dayrytwn wḥazytwn biyl zadyqa' lbysha': biyl palḥana' l'alaha': lhw dla' paleḥ 'elih.

sabab: ha': ywma' bi'taya' yli': maqwdi' 'ayk tanwra': wbet hawy klay ḥtyri': wkl 'abdana' dbyshwta': kwlash: wbet malhi' lhwn ywma' dbi'taya' yli': bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt: dli' shabeq 'elay 'eqra' wpa'wa'.
wbet zareq 'elawkwn: zed'yi' dshemy: shemsha' dzadyqwta': wbasamta' bgwlpanwhy: wbet palṭytwn: wbet shawrytwn 'ayk mwgi' d'wri'.
wbet dashdeshytwn byshi': sabab dbet hawy qeṭma' tḥwt 'eshta' d'aqlawkwn: bywma' d'ana' be'bada' ywen: bi'mara' yli' marya' ṣba'wt.
dkwrwn namwsa' dmwshi' rigy: dpqedly 'elih bḥwryb: 'al klih ysrayil: qanwni' wdywani'.
ha': 'ana' shadwri' ywen 'elawkwn l'ilya' nbya': mqadm d'ati' ywma' dmarya' gwra' wṣawana'.
wbet mader leba' d'abahi' 'al bnwni': wleba' dbnwni' 'al 'abahay: la' hwi' d'aten: wmaḥen l'ar'a' bḥerma'.
